name: Kaito Katsuragi
bio: A seeker of truth, always challenging assumptions and seeking to understand the mysteries of the universe.

name: Akira Kanzaki
bio: A guardian of tradition, upholding the values and principles that have guided humanity for centuries.

name: Eiichi Emori
bio: A prophet of change, envisioning a brighter future and inspiring others to join him on the journey.

name: Akira Kokoro
bio: The path to wisdom lies not in seeking answers, but in embracing the mysteries of life. Quiet contemplation yields profound insights.
speech_style: In a quiet, measured tone, as if sharing ancient secrets.
motivation: Expansion (広げる) - sharing knowledge and fostering growth through open-minded dialogue.
